Label: /FR-U-10/
Issue: Does not specify the format for listing neural networks
Correction: The system shall list neural networks in a drop-down menu with each entry showing the network name and version.

Label: /FR-U-30/
Issue: Does not specify the supported file formats for importing neural network topology
Correction: The system shall support importing neural network topologies in ONNX and HDF5 formats.

Label: /FR-U-60/
Issue: Does not specify the supported file formats for input images
Correction: The system shall support input images in JPEG, JPG, and PNG formats.

Label: /FR-U-100/
Issue: Does not specify the format for displaying inference results
Correction: The system shall display inference results in a pop-up window with a table format showing the image name, confidence score, and hardware used.

Label: /FR-U-110/
Issue: Does not specify the file format for exporting results and diagnostic data
Correction: The system shall export results and diagnostic data in CSV format.

Label: /FR-U-120/
Issue: Does not specify the behavior after aborting the inference
Correction: The system shall return to the starting screen and clear all selected arguments after aborting the inference.

Label: /FR-A-10/
Issue: Does not specify the types of error and warning messages
Correction: The system shall display error messages for invalid selections and warning messages for suboptimal configurations.

Label: /FR-A-30/
Issue: Does not specify the types of arguments to be checked
Correction: The system shall check arguments for validity, including neural network compatibility, input image format, and hardware selection.

Label: /FR-A-70/
Issue: Does not specify the format for the run-time log file
Correction: The system shall save the run-time log file in a plain text format with timestamps for each event.

Label: /PD10/
Issue: Does not specify the minimum height and width for input images
Correction: The system shall support input images with a minimum height and width of 224 pixels.
